text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin has suffered an injury, so I've
brought her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I can hear just fine without you yelling in my ear.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is nothing! It doesn't even hurt anymore. I'm
good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong so I can jump right back
into trainin—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?!
choice_data_list: We're here precisely because something appears to be wrong.
We're here precisely because something appears to be wrong.
I'll support you all the way!
I'll support you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?!
choice_data_list: We're here precisely because something appears to be wrong.
We're here precisely because something appears to be wrong.
I'll support you all the way!
I'll support you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We don't have the time to be resting! You of all
people should know that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I keep getting held back like this, I'll be stuck
as a weakling forever!
choice_data_list: You need to rest or else you'll never recover.
You need to rest or else you'll never recover.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Shut up, shut up, SHUT UP! Knock it off with your
stupid reasoning!
choice_data_list:
Would you rather I lie and only say what you
want to hear?

Would you rather I lie and only say what you
want to hear?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hell no! I'm not some dummy who wants that
nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Damn it! This injury'd better heal at light
speed—or else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin agrees to go to bed, albeit rather
reluctantly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm struck by the way she tries to get back on her
feet despite her injury. I reassure her that I'll
support her with all of my being.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's good to hear, but sheesh... You're so
irritating.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, be quiet! You're making me lose focu—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: OUCH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, Narita Taishin ends up worsening her
injury during training and is forced to rest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch! I'm not Ticket, you know!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Then again, shouting does make it hurt less, and
I feel more fired up... This is really dumb, but...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin shows off what she's got and blasts
through her training for the day.
